title: 'Peppa Pig' Backlash As Hasbro Asks Child Actors To Sign AI Clause
description: 'Peppa Pig' owner Hasbro has stoked anger by requiring child actors on the animated series to sign over their voices to artificial intelligence.
content:

description: Alan Curbishley has returned to football to take up a brand-new role as Charlton Athletic's Head of Artificial Intelligence.
content:

title: After Anthropic shutdown, China's Z. ai closes frontier gap as it plans dual listing
description: Chinese AI firm Z. ai is aiming for artificial general intelligence, fueled by strong investor interest after its GLM-5.2 model neared top US AI performance. The company plans a domestic listing to fund this ambitious goal. This development comes as global allies express concern over reliance on US-controlled AI, highlighting China's progress in bridging the frontier AI gap despite computing constraints.
content:

title: Akron school board approves new AI policy
description: AKRON — The Akron Public Schools (APS) Board of Education unanimously approved a new policy for the district at its June 22 meeting. The enactment of an artificial intelligence (AI) policy meets the deadline of July 1 mandated by Ohio House Bill 96 for every public school district in the state. Crafting the new policy

title: Alabama wants to add workforce skills test in high school. Here’s why that matters: op-ed
description: Artificial intelligence is already reshaping which jobs exist and what they require. Students deserve to know whether they have the skills to compete for them — before they make decisions about what comes after high school.
content:
This is a guest opinion column
